name: codex-plusplus
description: Tweak system for the OpenAI Codex desktop app

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @codex-plusplus/sdk && npm run build --workspace @codex-plusplus/runtime && npm run build --workspace @codex-plusplus/loader && npm run build --workspace codex-plusplus
scripts.check: npm test && npm run build && node scripts/check-release.mjs && npm run audit
